description: CUDA Driver API function database for zlink codegen. Covers all cu* functions from cuda.h, compatible with CUDA 12.4 and above including 13.x. Client and server always use the same zlink build — no protocol versioning needed. Functions not available in the installed CUDA version will return appropriate error codes at runtime. Each function is annotated with RPC marshalling semantics.

functions.name: cuInit
functions.comment: Initialize CUDA — must complete before any other call

functions.name: cuDriverGetVersion
functions.comment: Get driver version — handled locally, no RPC

functions.name: cuDeviceGetName
functions.comment: Returns device name string via out param

functions.name: cuDeviceGetProperties
functions.comment: CUdevprop struct too complex for simple RPC — use cuDeviceGetAttribute instead

functions.name: cuDevicePrimaryCtxRetain
functions.comment: ★★★ CRITICAL: PyTorch uses this exclusively to get CUDA context

functions.name: cuMemAlloc
functions.comment: ★★★ KEY: Allocates device memory, returns virtual devptr

functions.name: cuMemcpy2D
functions.comment: CUDA_MEMCPY2D struct too complex for simple codegen — needs manual handler

functions.name: cuMemcpy2D_v2
functions.comment: CUDA_MEMCPY2D struct too complex for simple codegen

functions.name: cuMemcpy2DUnaligned
functions.comment: CUDA_MEMCPY2D struct too complex for simple codegen

functions.name: cuMemcpy3D
functions.comment: CUDA_MEMCPY3D struct too complex for simple codegen

functions.name: cuMemCreate
functions.comment: CUmemGenericAllocationHandle produced; desc is CUmemAllocationProp struct

functions.name: cuMemMapArrayAsync
functions.comment: Array of CUmapInfo structs — too complex for simple codegen

functions.name: cuMemGetAllocationPropertiesFromHandle
functions.comment: CUmemAllocationProp output struct — needs manual handler

functions.name: cuLaunchKernel
functions.comment: ★★★ THE hot path — launches GPU kernels

functions.name: cuLaunchCooperativeKernel
cuLaunchCooperativeKernelMultiDevice
functions.comment: CU_LAUNCH_PARAMS struct array — needs manual handler

functions.name: cuLaunchHostFunc
functions.comment: Host function callbacks cannot be executed remotely — stub to CUDA_SUCCESS

functions.name: cuGetProcAddress
functions.comment: ★★★ CRITICAL: PyTorch 2.0+ resolves driver API functions via this

functions.name: cuStreamAddCallback
functions.comment: Host callbacks cannot be executed remotely

functions.name: cuStreamGetCaptureInfo
functions.comment: Complex output struct — needs manual handler

functions.name: cuStreamGetCaptureInfo_v2
functions.comment: Complex output struct — needs manual handler

functions.name: cuStreamUpdateCaptureDependencies
functions.comment: Array of CUgraphNode handles — needs manual handler

functions.name: cuOccupancyMaxActiveBlocksPerMultiprocessor
cuOccupancyMaxActiveBlocksPerMultiprocessorWithFlags
cuPointerGetAttributes
functions.comment: Multiple output attributes — needs manual handler

functions.name: cuGraphAddHostNode
functions.comment: Host node callbacks cannot run remotely

functions.name: cuGraphNodeGetDependencies
functions.comment: Returns array of CUgraphNode — needs manual handler

functions.name: cuGraphGetNodes
functions.comment: Returns array of CUgraphNode — needs manual handler

functions.name: cuGraphAddDependencies
functions.comment: Takes arrays of CUgraphNode — needs manual handler

functions.name: cuStreamBatchMemOp
functions.comment: Array of CUstreamBatchMemOpType — needs manual handler

functions.name: cuMemAllocAsync
functions.comment: Allocate memory from pool asynchronously — critical for PyTorch CUDA allocator

functions.name: cuMemFreeAsync
functions.comment: Free memory allocated with cuMemAllocAsync — critical for PyTorch CUDA allocator

functions.name: cuUserObjectCreate
functions.comment: User object callbacks cannot run remotely
